---
title: "scRNA Annotation Method Report: scGPT"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

import pandas as pd

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, package_versions_table

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
```

## Status

This report file is reserved for a future Python-native `scGPT` backend.

`scGPT` is a research-oriented foundation-model option and is not yet part of
the executable runtime for this template. The QMD file is kept here so the
report layout is already organized once that backend is added.

```{python}
status_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "method", "value": "scgpt"},
        {"field": "implemented_in_runtime", "value": "no"},
        {"field": "intended_role", "value": "foundation-model-based annotation and mapping"},
        {"field": "current_selected_methods", "value": ", ".join(context["selected_methods"])},
    ]
)
format_table(status_df)
```

## Planned Inputs

```{python}
planned_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"input": "model checkpoint", "purpose": "pretrained or fine-tuned foundation model weights"},
        {"input": "gene vocabulary mapping", "purpose": "align query genes to model vocabulary"},
        {"input": "fine-tuning controls", "purpose": "decide inference-only vs adaptation"},
        {"input": "GPU availability", "purpose": "practical runtime requirement for larger models"},
    ]
)
format_table(planned_df)
```

## Planned Diagnostics

```{python}
diagnostics_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"diagnostic": "predicted labels", "why_it_matters": "primary annotation output"},
        {"diagnostic": "confidence / uncertainty", "why_it_matters": "surface low-certainty assignments"},
        {"diagnostic": "agreement with other methods", "why_it_matters": "benchmark foundation-model behavior"},
        {"diagnostic": "runtime and resource summary", "why_it_matters": "track operational cost"},
    ]
)
format_table(diagnostics_df)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "scgpt"])
format_table(session_df)
```
